caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt with the text "DON'T EVER DO START AT WORK" and a matching green baseball cap with black headphones sits in a room filled with framed photos and clothing racks. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. In the initial moments, he looks down and handles a small, rectangular item. As the sequence progresses, he looks toward the camera and lifts a thin, translucent white strip or piece of paper toward his face. To his left, a logo featuring a circular icon and the word "SURE" is visible, while a red "SURE" logo appears to his right. The background includes a white mannequin wearing a white shirt and various pieces of apparel on racks. The man's expression shifts from focused concentration to a slight smile as he gestures with the white object.
